summary: ESNI Management | Media ID | Media Details Modal Displays Metadata And Viewing Policies
description: Verify Media Details modal displays metadata and viewing policies
gherkin:
When the user clicks the "Media Details" button (three-line icon) for any media row
And For Example: https://sop-qa.mlb.com/esni/media?searchType=DATE&searchValue=2026-02-12&details=media_2d25be4e-05cf-4657-ada3-4842183e5228
!xray-attachment://df65f1f1-22c1-4edd-9853-84d6479d9ed7|width=1149,height=212!
Then a modal should appear displaying media metadata including:
* Media ID
* Feed Type
* Media ID
* Sub Type
* Team (with logo)
* Process Rules (with an information tooltip on it)
And the modal should display a "Viewing Policies" section with:
* Policy Name
* Action
* Action Label
* Audience Href
And each viewing policy row should have a delete button (ⓧ icon) on the left
And a "Search" input field should be visible on the top-right of the Viewing Policies table
And a "View"  button should be visible next to the search field
And a button labeled "Add Viewing Policy" should be present above the Viewing Policies table
When the user clicks the "X" button on the modal on the top corner
Then the modal should close and return the user to the ESNI Management table view

steps.action: *When* the user clicks the "Media Details" button (three-line icon) for any media row
steps.result:
*Then* a modal should appear displaying media metadata including:

* Media ID
* Feed Type
* Media ID
* Sub Type
* Team (with logo)
* Process Rules (with an information tooltip on it) 

*And* the modal should display a "Viewing Policies" section with:

* Policy Name
* Action
* Action Label
* Audience Href

*And* each viewing policy row should have a delete button (ⓧ icon) on the left

*And* a "Search" input field should be visible on the top-right of the Viewing Policies table

*And* a "View"  button should be visible next to the search field

*And* a button labeled "Add Viewing Policy" should be present above the Viewing Policies table

steps.action: *When* the user clicks the "X" button on the modal on the top corner
steps.result: *Then* the modal should close and return the user to the ESNI Management table view
